falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5,200 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this key resistance level would contradict the pattern's implied bearish structure and invalidate the HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year Treasury yield rises above 4.5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a sharp increase in bond yields would indicate strong risk-on sentiment, directly opposing the pattern's implied safe-haven demand scenario

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate extreme volatility and momentum divergence, proving the current pattern match (86% to bottom_2024_aug) is statistically insignificant

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
